flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Nebraska Wesleyan University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Nebraska Wesleyan University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.3k → $43.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Nebraska Wesleyan University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.3k → $43.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Nebraska Wesleyan University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
